item.description: Machine Learning Theory Reference CS229 Syllabus cs229_lecture_notes.pdf Linear Regression §1 prior knowledge Maximum Likelihood Estimation (Maximum Likelihood Estimation，MLE) 似然函数 Wiki

Probability cs229-probability_review.pdf §1 Probability Introduction Element of Probability 样本空间 (Sample Space) 是指随机现象所有的基本结果组成的集合。 事件空间 (Event Space) 是指样本空间所有子集合所构成的集合 Permutation & Combination Combinatorics -Wiki

Natural Language Generation Recurrent Neural Network Milestone papers Paper Comments Source serial_order_a_parallel_distrmuted_processing_approach.pdf Jordan RNN 1986 finding_structure_in_time.pdf Elman RNN 1990 long_short_term_memory.pdf LSTM 1997 NIPS-2014-sequence-to-sequence-learning-with-neural-networks-Paper.
